title: kallstroemia adscendens
intro: Kallstroemia adscendens, also known as the desert moon or caltrop, is a plant species in the family Zygophyllaceae. It is native to the deserts of the southwestern United States, Mexico, and parts of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kallstroemia adscendens include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
